title: PVPCitsFav
description: PVPCF is a mod that allows you to add any pvp kit from mcpvp to favourite and starts pvp with this kit quick by drop sword on 1 slot on mcpvp
body:
# PVPCitsFav

---

# News

thx for 2k downloads!
according to this i post a big update 1.1.0 and planning one more big update with more cool features for mcpvp and mctiers 

## What's new:

### 1. auto gg
simple but always needed

### 2. subscribe for info about enemy
whenever you start a pvp match, this mod will check and send you the following info about your enemy:

1. your enemy mcpvp playtime (from the /profile command; not perfect, but it's the only working variant for now, I'm gonna improve it later)
2. your enemy points on mctiers (I haven't seen this in other mods yet sooo...)
3. your enemy tiers (for people who don't like tier tagger. At first, I wanted to show the enemy's tier in the kit that you are playing right now and the enemy's top kit, but right now I don't know how to get the kit you are playing, so I changed it (maybe temporarily, maybe forever) to fav kit from your config)

this is all the changes for now, but the next update is going to be way better and way more interesting (and hard for me ;(..)

---

# Description

This small client-side mod allows you to select your favourite PvP kit on **mcpvp.club** and instantly join the queue for it.

When you drop an iron sword from hotbar slot **1**, the mod automatically sends the queue command for your selected PvP kit.

---

# Features

- Select your favourite PvP kit  
- Instantly join the queue by dropping an iron sword from slot 1  
- Works only on mcpvp.club  
- Battle counter for the current session *(planned feature)*  

---

# Usage

First, you need to install:

- Fabric API  
- Cloth Config  
- Mod Menu  
- This mod  

After installing all required mods, open **Mod Menu** and find this mod in the list.

![mod in modmenu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7w2EQjWv/images/c64c2fd3eb90486881821c2c13e35c303d8dd150_350.webp)

Click the **Configuration** button to open the config menu.

![mod config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7w2EQjWv/images/7704d818854a17de1ed11067a55015fff7288265_350.webp)

In the config, replace the default **"Sword"** kit with your favourite PvP kit.

![kit select](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7w2EQjWv/images/09374889e02a79e9110a60681cd6065f25002dd2_350.webp)

Finally, join the **mcpvp** server.  
Every time you drop an iron sword from slot 1, the mod will automatically put you into the queue for your selected PvP kit.
